text: Deep learning is a rapidly growing field of research that is being applied to many common use cases. Most common data types such as images and sound are graphs with edges representing relationships between data points. So deep learning models for graph data is important for working with graphs. In this paper we will be identifying certain nodes and edges in applications such as text, entities and relations to construct graphs. We will be choosing GNN models for our applications as GNNs allow nodes in a graph to exchange messages and discover the relationships between the nodes and edges. We will be focusing on Graph Convolution Networks (GCNs), GraphSAGE and Graph Attention Networks (GATs) and will be discussing the message-passing mechanism that is adopted by all GNN models. We will also be discussing the pros and cons of GNN models for different applications. We will also be discussing the various applications of GNN models, datasets that are commonly used and also Python libraries that are used to implement GNN models. So this paper gives a great overview of GNN models and their research and also the practical implementation of these models.
